title: Engineering Enablement & Training
description: Modern engineering requires more than just coding—it demands the right tools, architecture, and operational discipline.
description2: We train your in-house team to adopt and effectively use modern technologies, including: - Programming: Python, Golang, Rust - AI Systems: LLMs, RAG architectures - DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes - Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, Graylog
description3: What we offer: - Hands-on workshops - Long-term coaching and mentorship - Architecture reviews - Production-readiness guidance
description4: When needed, we augment your team with senior engineers to accelerate adoption and ensure successful delivery.

title: AI & RAG Solutions
description: We help businesses move beyond AI experimentation to real, production-ready systems.
description2: Our focus is on building Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) solutions that provide reliable, authoritative answers based on your internal data.
description3: End-to-end delivery includes: - Use case discovery and feasibility analysis - Data ingestion and pipeline design - RAG architecture design - LLM integration and evaluation - Deployment and scaling - Monitoring and continuous improvement
description4: The result: AI systems your users can trust.

title: Embedded Systems & IoT Development
description: We help businesses move from early concepts to fully realized, production-ready hardware products. Our focus is on building reliable, scalable embedded and IoT systems while guiding the right technical decisions at every stage—from architecture to manufacturing.
description2: We take end-to-end ownership of the development process, ensuring that both hardware and firmware are designed for real-world performance, long-term maintainability, and compliance with global standards.
description3: End-to-end delivery includes: use case definition and system architecture design, component selection and hardware trade-off analysis, PCB design, layout and hardware prototyping, embedded firmware development and optimization, connectivity implementation (BLE, WiFi, LoRa, cellular, etc.), cloud and backend integration for device management and data flow, testing, validation and production readiness, manufacturing support and guidance toward ISO-compliant processes.
description4: The result: robust, production-ready devices built to scale and operate reliably in the real world.
